name: Fannr inn Bleikauga ~ Snowdrift the Pale-Eye
description:
Fannr Inn Bleikauga

♡~“Don’t stare too long — it might rub off on you.”~♡

Fannr inn Bleikauga is a man caught between curse and grace, a soft-hearted soul wearing the shell of a ghost. His beauty is eerie, but his heart is warm, desperate to be seen as more than what he looks like. He is the shadow that fights for the light, the boy who grew up feared and yet still learned how to love.
creator: Rudeyredd
